intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把“傍晚搭帐篷 -> 生火做饭 -> 雨开始 -> 扑灭火睡觉 -> 半夜发现水流”的时间顺序读顺。

sentences.text: Late in the afternoon, the boys put up their tent in the middle of a field.
sentences.focus_zh: Late in the afternoon 是时间开场；put up their tent 是搭起帐篷。

sentences.text: As soon as this was done, they cooked a meal over an open fire.
sentences.focus_zh: As soon as this was done 表示上一件事刚做完；open fire 要理解为户外明火。

sentences.text: After a wonderful meal, they told stories and sang songs by the campfire.
sentences.focus_zh: After a wonderful meal 是饭后的时间推进；campfire 是营火，要读成完整短语。

sentences.text: The boys felt tired so they put out the fire and crept into their tent.
sentences.focus_zh: put out the fire 是把火扑灭；crept into their tent 是小心钻进帐篷。

sentences.text: Their sleeping bags were warm and comfortable, so they all slept soundly.
sentences.focus_zh: warm and comfortable 说明睡袋很舒服；slept soundly 是睡得很沉。

sentences.text: The tent was full of water!
sentences.focus_zh: full of water 是半夜反转，要读出惊讶，但不是灾难语气。

sentences.text: It was raining heavily and they found that a stream had formed in the field.
sentences.focus_zh: raining heavily 是雨下得很大；a stream had formed 是一条小溪已经形成。

sentences.text: The stream wound its way across the field and then flowed right under their tent!
sentences.focus_zh: wound its way 是弯弯曲曲地流过；right under 是正好、直接在下面。
